sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 7.40 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.7)

statement.latex: Describe the (lattice of) subgroups of a given classical matrix group over a ring which contain the subgroup consisting of all matrices in that group with coefficients in some subring (see Ju.\,I.\,Merzljakov, J.~Soviet Math., 1 (1973), 571--593). { Yu.\,I.\,Merzlyakov} If the root system has single edges ($A_l$,$D_l$,$E_l$) and the larger ring is not quasi-algebraic over the smaller one, then it ...

reiAssessment.solveRationale: Group theory I_INFINITE_SEARCH; Rei not specialized in group theory (yet)
reiAssessment.formalizationNotes: Kourovka problems are typically research-level group theory
